name: Palantir / 帕兰蒂尔
sector: AI software and data platforms / AI 软件与数据平台
summary: Palantir 是 AI 应用和数据平台公司，代表算力、数据和模型落到政府与企业工作流后的应用层。 / Palantir is an AI application and data-platform company, representing the application layer where compute, data, and models enter government and enterprise workflows.
summaryZh: Palantir 是 AI 应用和数据平台公司，代表算力、数据和模型落到政府与企业工作流后的应用层。
summaryEn: Palantir is an AI application and data-platform company, representing the application layer where compute, data, and models enter government and enterprise workflows.

updateCadence.最新动态: 暂不启用定时；计划启用后每 12 小时
updateCadence.财务与公告: 暂不启用定时；计划启用后每日

updateCadence.供应链溯源: 暂不启用定时；计划启用后每周

business.description: 公司提供 Gotham、Foundry、Apollo 和 AIP 等软件平台，服务政府、国防、情报、商业和工业客户。 / The company provides software platforms such as Gotham, Foundry, Apollo, and AIP for government, defense, intelligence, commercial, and industrial customers.
business.descriptionZh: 公司提供 Gotham、Foundry、Apollo 和 AIP 等软件平台，服务政府、国防、情报、商业和工业客户。
business.descriptionEn: The company provides software platforms such as Gotham, Foundry, Apollo, and AIP for government, defense, intelligence, commercial, and industrial customers.
revenueModel: AI 平台订阅与服务 / AI platform subscriptions and services

segments.name: Total revenue
segments.note: 批量自动稿仅使用可核对的总收入；分部收入拆分需要后续人工读取年报表格。
segments.noteZh: 批量自动稿仅使用可核对的总收入；分部收入拆分需要后续人工读取年报表格。
segments.noteEn: The batch draft uses only verifiable total revenue; segment revenue split requires later manual annual-report table review.

business.thesis: 如果 AI 基建投资进入应用兑现阶段，Palantir 的关键变量是 AIP 落地、政府/商业客户扩张和软件利润率，而不是上游硬件瓶颈。 / If AI infrastructure spending moves into application monetization, Palantir's key variables are AIP adoption, government/commercial customer expansion, and software margins rather than upstream hardware bottlenecks.
business.thesisZh: 如果 AI 基建投资进入应用兑现阶段，Palantir 的关键变量是 AIP 落地、政府/商业客户扩张和软件利润率，而不是上游硬件瓶颈。
business.thesisEn: If AI infrastructure spending moves into application monetization, Palantir's key variables are AIP adoption, government/commercial customer expansion, and software margins rather than upstream hardware bottlenecks.
riskNotes: 估值对增长和利润率预期敏感，客户扩张若放慢会压缩弹性。 / Valuation is sensitive to growth and margin expectations; slower customer expansion would compress upside.
政府合同、隐私/监管和企业 AI 预算周期会影响需求。 / Government contracts, privacy/regulation, and enterprise AI budget cycles affect demand.

failureConditions.condition: AI 应用落地没有带来商业客户扩张、净留存或利润率改善。
failureConditions.conditionZh: AI 应用落地没有带来商业客户扩张、净留存或利润率改善。
failureConditions.conditionEn: The thesis weakens if AI application deployment does not translate into commercial customer growth, retention, or margin improvement.
failureConditions.monitor: 跟踪客户数、剩余履约义务、政府/商业收入、AIP 采用和经营利润率。
failureConditions.monitorZh: 跟踪客户数、剩余履约义务、政府/商业收入、AIP 采用和经营利润率。
failureConditions.monitorEn: Monitor customer count, remaining performance obligations, government/commercial revenue, AIP adoption, and operating margin.

failureConditions.condition: 企业 AI 预算回报不清晰，导致软件订单推迟。
failureConditions.conditionZh: 企业 AI 预算回报不清晰，导致软件订单推迟。
failureConditions.conditionEn: The thesis weakens if unclear enterprise AI ROI delays software orders.
failureConditions.monitor: 跟踪销售周期、合同规模、续约、试点转正式部署比例。
failureConditions.monitorZh: 跟踪销售周期、合同规模、续约、试点转正式部署比例。
failureConditions.monitorEn: Monitor sales cycles, contract size, renewals, and pilot-to-production conversion.

supplyChain.thesisZh: 如果 AI 基建投资进入应用兑现阶段，Palantir 的关键变量是 AIP 落地、政府/商业客户扩张和软件利润率，而不是上游硬件瓶颈。
supplyChain.thesisEn: If AI infrastructure spending moves into application monetization, Palantir's key variables are AIP adoption, government/commercial customer expansion, and software margins rather than upstream hardware bottlenecks.

themeExposure.role: 企业与政府 AI 应用平台
themeExposure.roleZh: 企业与政府 AI 应用平台
themeExposure.roleEn: Enterprise and government AI application platform
themeExposure.rationale: Palantir 处在 AI 应用兑现层，受益于算力和模型进入真实工作流，但瓶颈属性弱于电力、网络和存储等基础设施层。
themeExposure.rationaleZh: Palantir 处在 AI 应用兑现层，受益于算力和模型进入真实工作流，但瓶颈属性弱于电力、网络和存储等基础设施层。
themeExposure.rationaleEn: Palantir sits in the AI application monetization layer and benefits as compute and models enter real workflows, but its bottleneck attributes are weaker than power, networking, and memory infrastructure layers.
